DEFEND_WATCHER.title: Defend
STRIKE_WATCHER.title: Strike
VIGILANCE.title: Vigilance
ERUPTION.title: Eruption
BOWLING_BASH.title: Bowling Bash
BOWLING_BASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each enemy in combat.
CONSECRATE.title: Consecrate
CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
CRUSH_JOINTS.title: Crush Joints
CRUSH_JOINTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this combat was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
CUT_THROUGH_FATE.title: Cut Through Fate
EMPTY_FIST.title: Empty Fist
INSIGHT.title: Insight
FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.title: Flurry of Blows
FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you change Stances, return this from the discard pile to your hand.
FLYING_SLEEVES.title: Flying Sleeves
FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow-Up
FOLLOW_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played was an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
JUST_LUCKY.title: Just Lucky
REACH_HEAVEN.title: Reach Heaven
REACH_HEAVEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Through Violence[/gold] into your draw pile.
THROUGH_VIOLENCE.title: Through Violence
SASH_WHIP.title: Sash Whip
SASH_WHIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played
this combat was an
Attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
THIRD_EYE.title: Third Eye
TRANQUILITY.title: Tranquility
WINDMILL_STRIKE.title: Windmill Strike
WINDMILL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its damage by {RetainIncrease:diff()} this combat.
EMPTY_BODY.title: Empty Body
EMPTY_MIND.title: Empty Mind
HALT.title: Halt
HALT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold],
gain {WrathBlock:diff()} additional
[gold]Block[/gold].
PRESSURE_POINTS.title: Pressure Points
PRESSURE_POINTS.description:
Apply {MarkPower:diff()} [gold]Mark[/gold].
ALL enemies lose Hp
equal to their [gold]Mark[/gold]
PROSTRATE.title: Prostrate
PROTECT.title: Protect
INNER_PEACE.title: Inner Peace
INNER_PEACE.description: If you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards, otherwise enter [gold]Calm[/gold]
RUSHDOWN.title: Rushdown
CARVE_REALITY.title: Carve Reality
CARVE_REALITY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
CONCLUDE.title: Conclude
CONCLUDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
End your turn.
DECEIVE_REALITY.title: Deceive Reality
DECEIVE_REALITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Safety[/gold] into your hand.
FEAR_NO_EVIL.title: Fear No Evil
FEAR_NO_EVIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.title: Foreign Influence
FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 Attacks of any color to add to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show:
It costs 0 this turn|}
JUDGMENT.title: Judgment
JUDGMENT.description: If the enemy has {DamageThreshold:diff()} or lesss HP, set their HP to 0.
RAGNAROK.title: Ragnarok
RAGNAROK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
SIGNATURE_MOVE.title: Signature Move
SIGNATURE_MOVE.description:
Can only be played if this is the only Attack in your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SIMMERING_FURY.title: Simmering Fury
SIMMERING_FURY.description: At the start of your next turn, enter [gold]Wrath[/gold] and draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
TANTRUM.title: Tantrum
TANTRUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
Shuffle this card into your draw pile.
WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.title: Wave of the Hand
WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, apply {WaveOfTheHandPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
WEAVE.title: Weave
WEAVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Scry[/gold], return this from the discard pile to your Hand.
WHEEL_KICK.title: Wheel Kick
BATTLE_HYMN.title: Battle Hymn
BATTLE_HYMN.description: At the start of each turn, add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
SMITE.title: Smite
SAFETY.title: Safety
COLLECT.title: Collect
COLLECT.description:
Put a [gold]Miracle+[/gold] into
 your hand at the start
of your next {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} turns.
MIRACLE.title: Miracle
EVALUATE.title: Evaluate
EVALUATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
FASTING.title: Fasting
FASTING.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]
Gain 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
INDIGNATION.title: Indignation
INDIGNATION.description: If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies, otherwise enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
LIKE_WATER.title: Like Water
LIKE_WATER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MEDITATE.title: Meditate
MEDITATE.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your discard pile into your hand and [gold]Retain[/gold] {Cards:plural:it|them}.
Enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
End your turn.
MENTAL_FORTRESS.title: Mental Fortress
NIRVANA.title: Nirvana
PERSEVERANCE.title: Perseverance
PERSEVERANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever this card is [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}
PRAY.title: Pray
PRAY.description:
Gain {MantraPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
SANCTITY.title: Sanctity
SANCTITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the last card played this combat was a Skill draw 2 cards
STUDY.title: Study
STUDY.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
SWIVEL.title: Swivel
SWIVEL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next Attack you play costs 0
TALK_TO_THE_HAND.title: Talk to the Hand
TALK_TO_THE_HAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you attack this enemy, gain {BlockReturnPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
WALLOP.title: Wallop
WALLOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
WORSHIP.title: Worship
DEVOTION.title: Devotion
DEVOTION.description: At the start of your turn, gain {DevotionPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
FORESIGHT.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Scry[/gold] {ForesightPower:diff()}.
BRILLIANCE.title: Brilliance
BRILLIANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Mantra[/gold] gained this combat.
LESSON_LEARNED.title: Lesson Learned
LESSON_LEARNED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your deck.
SANDS_OF_TIME.title: Sands of Time
SANDS_OF_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], lower its cost by 1 this combat.
SCRAWL_WATCHER.title: Scrawl
SCRAWL_WATCHER.description: Draw cards until you hand is full.
VAULT.title: Vault
VAULT.description:
Take an extra turn after this one.
End your turn.
BLASPHEMY.title: Blasphemy
CONJURE_BLADE.title: Conjure Blade
CONJURE_BLADE.description: Shuffle an [gold]Expunger[/gold] into your draw pile.
EXPUNGER.title: Expunger
DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
DEUS_EX_MACHINA.description: When you draw this card, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Miracles[/gold] to your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
ESTABLISHMENT.title: Establishment
ESTABLISHMENT.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Retained[/gold], reduce its cost by 1 this combat.
OMNISCIENCE.title: Omniscience
OMNISCIENCE.description: Choose a card in your draw pile. Play the chosen card twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
OMNISCIENCE.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to play twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] i.
SPIRIT_SHIELD.title: Spirit Shield
SPIRIT_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your hand.
MASTER_REALITY.title: Master Reality
MASTER_REALITY.description: Whenever a card is created during combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
WREATH_OF_FLAME.title: Wreath of Flames
WREATH_OF_FLAME.description: Your next Attack deals {VigorPower:diff()} additional damage.
OMEGA.title: Omega
OMEGA.description: At the end of your turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
BETA.title: Beta
BETA.description: Shuffle an [gold]Omega[/gold] into your draw pile.
ALPHA.title: Alpha
ALPHA.description: Shuffle an [gold]Beta[/gold] into your draw pile.
DEVA_FORM.title: Deva Form
DEVA_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and increase this gain by 1.
BECOME_ALMIGHTY.title: Become Almighty
FAME_AND_FORTUNE.title: Fame and Fortune
LIVE_FOREVER.title: Live Forever
WISH_WATCHER.title: Wish
WISH_WATCHER.description:
Choose one:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} Plated Armor,
{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], or {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
